calc
  f⁻¹ * f = (antipodeBialgHom.comp f) * f := rfl
  _ = (antipodeBialgHom.comp f : C →ₐ[R] A) * f := by
    simp [antipodeBialgHom.map_smul', BialgHomClass.map_smul', LinearMap.map_smul]
  _ = ( (antipodeBialgHom : C →ₐc[R] C).toAlgHom.comp f) * f := by
    simp [BialgHomClass.toAlgHom_coe]
  _ = ( (antipodeBialgHom : C →ₐc[R] C).toAlgHom.comp f) * (id.comp f) := by simp [AlgHom.id]
  _ = ( (antipodeBialgHom : C →ₐc[R] C).toAlgHom * id).comp f := by
    simp [convMul_comp, id_comp, BialgHomClass.toAlgHom_coe]
    <;>
    (try
      simp_all [LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.convMul_apply, LinearMap zwłaszcza przy_twierdzeniach_tresci]) <;>
    (try
      aesop) <;>
    (try
      ext; simp_all [AlgebraLinearMap, LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.convMul_apply])
    <;>
    (try
      ring_nf) <;>
    (try
      simp_all [AlgebraLinearMap, LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.convMul_apply])
  _ = ((antipodeBialgHom : C →ₐc[R] C).toAlgHom * id) := by
    apply mul_left_cancel₀ (show (f : C →ₐc[R] A) ≠ 0 by
      -- Prove that f is not zero to cancel it
      intro hf
      have h₁ := hf
      simp_all [CoeTC.comp_apply, BialgHomClass.toAlgHom_coe, LinearMap.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try
        aesop) <;>
      (try
        simp_all [AlgebraLinearMap, LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.convMul_apply])
      <;>
      (try
        ring_nf) <;>
      (try
        simp_all [AlgebraLinearMap, LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.convMul_apply]))
   _ = 1 := by
    have h₂ : (antipodeBialgHom : C →ₐc[R] C).toAlgHom * id = 1 := by
      have h₃ : (antipodeBialgHom : C →ₐc[R] C).toAlgHom = (antipodeAlgHom R C) := by
        rfl
      rw [h₃]
      have h₄ : (antipodeAlgHom R C : C →ₐ[R] C) * AlgHom.id R C = 1 := by
        ext; simp [convMul_def, Antipode.map_mul, Bialgebra.counit_mul, mul_one]
        <;>
        (try
          simp_all [AlgebraLinearMap, LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.convMul_apply])
        <;>
        (try
          aesop)
        <;>
        (try
          ring_nf)
        <;>
        (try
          simp_all [AlgebraLinearMap, LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.convMul_apply])
      simpa [AlgHom.id] using h₄
    simpa using h₂

by
  have h₁ : f⁻¹ * f = (antipodeBialgHom.comp f) * f := by rfl
  rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : (antipodeBialgHom.comp f : C →ₐc[R] A) * f = 1 := by
    calc
      (antipodeBialgHom.comp f : C →ₐc[R] A) * f
        = (antipodeBialgHom.comp f : C →ₐci[R] A) * f := by simp [Convolution.conv]
      _ = 1 := by
        -- Use the fact that the antipode is the inverse of f in the convolution algebra
        simpa [Convolution.conv, convolution_mul_def, antipodeBialgHom] using inv_helper f.symm
  rw [h₂]
  <;> simp_all [Convolution.conv]
  <;> simp_all [convolution_mul_def]
  <;> simp_all [antipodeBialgHom]
  <;> simp_all [inv_helper]
  <;> simp_all [BialgHomClass.map_comp_comul]
  <;> simp_all [IsCocomm]
  <;> simp_all [Commutative]
  <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
  <;> simp_all [mul_assoc]
  <;> simp_all [mul_left_comm]
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [antipodeBialgHom]
      <;> simp_all [antipodeAlgHom]
      <;> simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib]
      <;> simp_all [mul_assoc]
      <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
      <;> simp_all [mul_left_comm]
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      ext x
      simp_all [antipodeBialgHom]
      <;> simp_all [antipodeAlgHom]
      <;> simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib]
      <;> simp_all [mul_assoc]
      <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
      <;> simp_all [mul_left_comm]
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [antipodeBialgHom]
      <;> simp_all [antipodeAlgHom]
      <;> simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib]
      <;> simp_all [mul_assoc]
      <;> simp_all [mul_comm]
      <;> simp_all [mul_left_comm]
    })
